narration: Your social feed isn't entertainment — it's a store. The average American loses $2,100 a year inside it, and never sees it coming.
visual: Smartphone SVG showing a scrolling social feed with product cards, dollar signs flying upward out of the phone screen, counter animating up to $2,100, title 'TIKTOK MADE YOU BUY IT' springs in from top

narration: Number one — the algorithm tracks every pause and like to learn exactly what makes you spend. It has unlimited time to study you, and it never forgets.
visual: Phone SVG on the left beside a large eye icon representing the algorithm watching, dashed data lines connecting to three glowing orange nodes, 'TRACKS EVERY PAUSE + LIKE' badge reveals with spring animation

narration: Number two — '847 bought this today' fires your FOMO alarm. Seventy-three percent of Gen Z has purchased something directly from a social post.
visual: Orange notification badge with counter animating up to 847, ten person silhouettes where seven are highlighted orange representing 73%, progress bar filling to 73% with 'GEN Z BOUGHT FROM A SOCIAL POST' label

narration: Number three — one-tap checkout is the kill shot. No wallet, no friction, no second thoughts. Removing checkout friction increases your spending by thirty-five percent.
visual: Credit card SVG centered with chip and contactless waves, glowing 'BUY NOW — 1 TAP' button pulses with spring animation, counter animates to +35% SPEND

narration: Here's the real cost. That $2,100 invested at eight percent instead grows to $315,000 by retirement. Your scroll-and-buy habit just consumed a down payment.
visual: Two side-by-side growing bar charts: orange 'SPENT' bar static at $2,100, green 'INVESTED' bar grows dramatically with animated counter to $315,000, star icon floats above the growing bar

narration: Turn off one-tap checkout. Unlink your saved card from every shopping app. Friction is your only firewall — follow for one money truth every day.
visual: Smartphone SVG with three toggle switches animating from ON (orange) to OFF (grey) in sequence — one-tap checkout, saved payment, auto-buy alerts — then 'FOLLOW FOR MORE' CTA button springs in
